name: yourwifey-ralph-wiggum-loop
description: Bounded Codex exec loop for YourWifey Grillo memory work.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Grillo memory adaptation moving from a stable prompt/status file.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex exec loop for bounded YourWifey implementation passes. Each iteration reads the Grillo memory status, picks one narrow patch, verifies it, updates the status doc, and stops only on a real completion promise.
defaultPrompt: Make the next smallest verified Grillo memory patch.
Update status and commit coherent checkpoints.
